{{Infobox character
| name = Blackwatch traitor
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch traitor]] has an intricate, squirming tattoo masking half his face.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
